meta.title: Blimpify - Professional Website Without the Hassle
meta.description: Blimpify helps businesses get a professional website without having to build or design it themselves. You share your wishes – we handle design, structure, and publishing.

hero.subtitle: We don't just build websites. We take responsibility for them.

items.title: Set the Direction
items.description: Create an account and submit your choices and preferences. No technical decisions required.

items.title: We Build Your Website
items.description: We build the website based on your input and ensure everything fits together.

items.title: Review and Adjust
items.description: You review and adjust until it feels right.

items.title: Publish and Move Forward
items.description: Once you're satisfied, the website is published. Blimpify then takes responsibility for keeping it running over time.

blocks.title: An Integrated System
blocks.description: Your website is built in Blimpify's system, which allows us to take full responsibility for design, structure, and overall coherence over time.

blocks.title: Design That Lasts
blocks.description: A dedicated design and UI system ensures your website can evolve without losing its expression or needing to be rebuilt.

blocks.title: Stable Operations We Own
blocks.description: We are responsible for operations, performance, and security with proven infrastructure to ensure your website is fast and stable.

items.name: Kevin Jansson
items.content: Extremely awesome guys who know what they're doing, from website sketch to final production everything has been 10/10. I'm extremely impressed

items.name: Rickson Mansiamina
items.content: Thanks for the journey, guys! It has been a really good collaboration. You have been responsive and really fine-tuned until the website became exactly as I wanted it. You have not just delivered, you have cared. Big thanks for everything!

items.name: Filip Blank
items.content: From first contact to launch, the collaboration has worked smoothly and professionally. You have been responsive to my wishes. The technical side works without problems so I am very satisfied

items.name: Philip Flensburg.
items.content: Strongly recommend letting the team create and maintain your website. They have always been accommodating and incredibly fast and efficient to work with.

pricing.title: How Can We Help Your Business?

standard.title: Blimpify Membership (Standard)
standard.subtitle: For businesses that want to focus on their business – not their website.
features: A professional website, created based on your choices
Structure and foundation that works over time
Ability to adjust text, colors, and details as needed
Help with domain connection and publishing
Overview of how the website is being used

custom.title: When Needs Go Beyond Standard
custom.subtitle: Tailored solution for larger companies
features: A larger project with clear project management
Solutions adapted to your business and workflows
Support for more advanced functionality as needed
A dedicated contact and long-term collaboration
Contracts and arrangements tailored to scope and requirements

items.question: What does Blimpify do?
items.answer: Blimpify helps businesses create and manage their website without having to think about the whole picture. You share your wishes and goals – we take responsibility for design, structure, and execution.

items.question: Do I need to know design or technology?
items.answer: No. You only need to describe how you want the website to feel and function. We handle the technical and design aspects for you.

items.question: Can I make changes myself?
items.answer: Yes, you can adjust smaller things like text, colors, and details yourself. For larger changes in structure or functionality, we help you.

items.question: When do I pay for the service?
items.answer: It's free to create and submit your website. You pay only when you choose to publish the website and activate the membership.

items.question: How does the process work?
items.answer: You submit your choices and preferences, we create the website based on that and get back to you when it's ready for review. When you're satisfied, you can choose to publish.

items.question: Is Blimpify suitable for all businesses?
items.answer: Blimpify is suitable for businesses that know design and development aren't their core competencies and would rather let specialists take responsibility for the whole picture. You contribute direction and goals – we handle design, structure, and execution.

footer.tagline: We don't just build websites. We take responsibility for them.
